title: NewsResult
description: Individual news-vertical result row (--vertical news|all). Hand-maintained from `src/types.rs::NewsResult` (v0.8.9, GAP-WS-104). Extracted from the Chrome-rendered DOM of the ia=news&iar=news SERP. Only posicao, titulo and url are guaranteed; the remaining fields depend on which selector cascade strategy matched (A: semantic data-react-module-id selectors from selectors.toml [news]; B: class-agnostic fallback).

posicao.description: 1-based position in the news result list.

url.description: Article URL, resolved to the external destination (internal duckduckgo.com links are filtered out; deduped by URL preserving order).

fonte.description: Publisher/source name (e.g. 'G1', 'Reuters'). Absent when not extractable (skip_serializing_if).

data_relativa.description: Relative timestamp verbatim as rendered by DuckDuckGo (e.g. 'há 2 horas', '3 hours ago'). No absolute-date conversion. Absent when not extractable (skip_serializing_if).

thumbnail.description: Thumbnail image URL. Protocol-relative sources (//host/img.jpg) are resolved to https://. Absent when not extractable (skip_serializing_if).
